subject: Ecology
title: Marine Protected Areas
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Marine Protected Areas.

hook.text: Only about 8% of the world's oceans are designated as protected areas.

buildup.text: Inside well-enforced marine reserves, fish populations can double or triple in years.

discovery.text: Spillover from reserves boosts fishing yields in surrounding waters too.

twist.text: Many protected areas exist only on paper—without enforcement, poaching continues.

climax.text: Scientists say at least 30% of oceans need protection by 2030 to preserve biodiversity.

punchline.text: Protection works—when it's real, not just on paper.

quiz.question: What percentage of oceans are currently protected?
